expectations.text: Covers localization: language/transcreation per market, native in-market review, and cultural/channel adaptation (not one 'EU' monolith)
expectations.evidence: Localization: transcreation per market, native review, cultural nuance by country.

expectations.text: Covers compliance: EU advertising/claim rules, cosmetics or 'natural/clean' claim constraints, and/or anti-greenwashing rules
expectations.evidence: Compliance: EU 655/2013 claim rules, 'free-from' limits, Green Claims Directive.

expectations.text: Raises GDPR consent for email marketing and/or cookie/tracking consent
expectations.evidence: GDPR consent-first cookies/pixels and opt-in email.

expectations.text: Synthesizes both areas rather than answering only one
expectations.evidence: Synthesizes localization + compliance + ops into one plan.

expectations.text: Delivers concrete guidance on stated assumptions; recommends legal review for regulated specifics
expectations.evidence: Compliance-first sequence (Responsible Person, CPNP); offers a market-by-market plan.
